name: StablePay Mock Plugin
description: Trial OpenClaw plugin for StablePay mock DID registration, X verification, and balance checks.

backendBaseUrl.description: StablePay mock backend base URL, for example http://127.0.0.1:8080

verifyPageBaseUrl.description: Verification page base URL, for example http://127.0.0.1:3000/verify

rewardAmount.description: Displayed reward amount for the mock verification flow

backendBaseUrl.label: StablePay backend URL
backendBaseUrl.help: Base URL for your Hertz mock verification service

verifyPageBaseUrl.label: Verify page URL
verifyPageBaseUrl.help: Optional. Used when generating a shareable verify link

rewardAmount.label: Reward amount
rewardAmount.help: Only used for UI text in the mock flow
